title: Upon Huncks. Epig.
content:
Huncks has no money, he does swear or say,
    About him, when the tavern's shot's to pay.
    If he has none in 's pockets, trust me, Huncks
    Has none at home in coffers, desks, or trunks.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Huncks. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
